prds.name: Bug Fixes
prds.notes: All 9 bugs resolved (BUG-001–009). BUG-008: storage bucket constraints via migration. BUG-009: drag-to-reorder via @dnd-kit/sortable.

prds.name: Firebase to Supabase Backend Migration
prds.notes: Google and Apple OAuth deferred — email/password auth active. Configure providers in Supabase dashboard when ready.

prds.name: Apple Auth Setup & Google Auth Removal
List Colors
prds.notes: US-001–004 all complete. US-004 went through 3 iterations: opacity tint → full-color backgrounds → 4px left border accent (final).

prds.name: Desktop Avatar Upload
prds.notes: BUG-007 fix. Desktop header avatar now clickable to upload profile image. Mirrors MobileSettings pattern.

prds.name: Walmart Affiliate API Image Search
prds.notes: All 6 stories complete. Walmart → Open Food Facts → SerpAPI fallback chain deployed as search-products Edge Function. Old search-images kept for rollback.

prds.name: iOS App Store Deployment
prds.notes: All 11 stories complete. Capacitor 8.1.0, native Apple Sign-In, Universal Links, App Store metadata/privacy, Xcode build config. Ready for archive + submission.

prds.name: Full Recipes Feature
prds.notes: All 17 stories complete. Full recipe CRUD, sharing, templates, import, Add to List, desktop layout with Lists/Recipes tab switcher.

prds.name: Rebrand ShoppingListAI to Gather
prds.notes: All 22 stories resolved. 19 completed, 1 already-complete (US-021), 1 skipped (US-022). Full rebrand from ShoppingListAI to Gather complete across UI, metadata, iOS config, logos, colors, edge functions, Apple Sign-In, Universal Links.

prds.name: Recipe Collections
prds.notes: All 15 stories complete. Collections grouping layer above recipes with collection-level sharing. DB schema + migration, service layer CRUD + sharing, RecipeContext state, UI for collection/recipe browsing, mobile drill-down, share modal, emoji picker, delete dialog. Per-recipe sharing removed.

prds.name: Swipe-to-Delete + Shake-to-Undo
prds.notes: All 14 stories complete. Undo stack hook + context, shake detection with iOS DeviceMotion permission, swipe-left gesture on shopping items with delete zone visual + exit animation + restore animation. Undo wired to delete item, clear checked, move recipe, unshare list. Edge gesture zone exclusion.

prds.name: iOS Asset Rebrand
prds.notes: All 3 stories complete. Rewrote generate-icons.js to use sharp for SVG rasterization. PWA icons, Capacitor icons, splash screens all regenerated with Gather branding. Xcode asset catalog rebuilt.

prds.name: Splash Screen Stacked Logo
prds.notes: 1 story complete. Splash screens now show stacked Gather logo (icon + name + tagline) with embedded Nunito fonts. Light splash: white bg. Dark splash: #1a1a2e with white text. Xcode assets rebuilt.

prds.name: Rebrand Gather to Gather Lists
prds.notes: All 15 stories complete. Rebrand from Gather to Gather Lists across logos (two-tone tspan treatment), UI (header, login, welcome, PWA banner), metadata (HTML, Capacitor, iOS, App Store, privacy policy), script JSDoc, dark mode splash verification, asset regeneration (PWA icons, Capacitor icons, splash screens, Xcode catalog), and style guide.

prds.name: Update Bundle ID to com.gatherlists
prds.notes: All 5 stories complete. Bundle ID updated from com.gather.app to com.gatherlists across capacitor.config.ts, pbxproj, Info.plist, AuthContext.jsx, and AASA file. Build and cap sync verified.

prds.name: Custom Domain Migration (gatherlists.com)
prds.notes: All 7 stories complete. Domain migrated from gatherapp.vercel.app to gatherlists.com across auth redirect, CORS origins (both edge functions), iOS entitlements, AASA verification, privacy policy, App Store metadata. Old domain kept as fallback in CORS and entitlements. Build and cap sync verified.

prds.name: iOS UI Cleanup
prds.notes: All 10 stories complete. CSS spacing tightening, store badge border fix, chevron removal, price placeholder hiding, compact AddItemForm, iOS-style + button, push navigation transition, image lightbox improvements, collapsible store groups, and full Store Manager rewrite matching ListSelector polish.

prds.name: Native Swift iOS App — Phase 1: Project Setup & Auth
prds.notes: All 7 stories complete. Native SwiftUI iOS app created at ios-native/ with Xcode project, Supabase Swift SDK, auth state management, Apple Sign-In, email/password auth, 4-tab shell, app icon, launch screen, entitlements, privacy manifest. Build succeeds on iPhone 16e simulator.

prds.name: Native Swift iOS App — Phase 2: Lists Core
prds.notes: All 9 stories complete. Codable data models, ListService CRUD+sharing, @Observable ListViewModel with realtime subscriptions, ListBrowserView with owned/shared sections, create/edit/delete flows, emoji picker, share modal, list detail view with navigation, pull-to-refresh, duplicate channel guard. Build succeeds on iPhone 16e simulator.
